It is the go-to for tech titans like Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ:MSFT) and Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ:META). But with supply shortages and U.S. export bans choking sales to China, startups and sovereign AI dreamers in India and the UAE are increasingly turning to Advanced Micro Devices Inc (NASDAQ:AMD).
